data.description: Half-elves are a mix of elven and human ancestry.
data.age: 18 years old is considered adult, but any age can be chosen

features.name: Breath weapon
features.description: The dragonborn can breathe a small burst of fire (or other type of breath weapon) as a bonus action.

features.name: Draconic ancestry
features.description: The dragonborn can cast the following draconic ancestries spells: * Breath weapon * Acid splash
